character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Directed defense preparations, reprimanded Gray for negligence, assigned positions to crew members, and strategized against the attack.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to the north side with Gray, acknowledged as the best shot, and participated in defensive coordination.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to defend the door, fired through the porch, and accurately counted enemy shots.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Fired the first shot, received reprimand from the captain for failing to warn of the attack.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Fired the first shot, responded calmly to the captain's orders, and remained alert during the attack.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to load muskets and assist in defense, received breakfast from the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Distributed brandy to the crew and participated in defensive preparations.
